summary: Tested iteration 4 new features: Budapest 7th city card, Origin story section in YouTab, plus regression on Gift/Things/Adventures/Audio.

ui_bugs.issue: Mazel Tov restaurant name not mentioned in caption — content.js only has generic caption 'History, warmth, your roots.' No 'Mazel Tov' text found anywhere in codebase. Review request mentioned it but it was never implemented.

issues: Origin photo panels load lazily; first photo (hiking) partially visible on scroll — renders correctly after scroll animation completes

action_items: Optional: Add 'Mazel Tov' to Budapest city card caption if it was intended as per review request
critical_code_review_comments: All new features (Budapest 7th city card with #E8A838 accent, ORIGIN_STORY with 2 panels, bridge text) are correctly implemented in content.js and YouTab
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 and 4 both pass. App is a static React birthday portal with password gate (Snusen123). YOU tab has hero + origin story (2 photo panels) + 7 city cards. All tabs functional. Audio toggle present bottom-right.

test_results.origin_story_panel_1_Age4: PASS (confirmed in DOM text first run)
